title: Import data from Excel to a new group and then move it the an existing board crashes data
excerpt: I have to bring data from our Website to Monday.com. The data structure in Monday contains additional fields. Column names match perfectly in both data sets, importing is not an issue, all status column are correctly set…

posts.author: GaryKneip (Gary Kneip)
posts.cookedHtml: I have to bring data from our Website to Monday.com. The data structure in Monday contains additional fields. Column names match perfectly in both data sets, importing is not an issue, all status column are correctly set, however, after moving the data to its destination board, all data is corrupt, some columns stay blank, other have values which are wrong. It’s a pain.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @GaryKneip, so sorry to hear you are running into this issue! If it’s persisting, could you write into support@monday.com about it with a short screen recording of the import and then moving process? That way we’ll be able to take a closer look and escalate to our developers much more quickly.
